page: Vultr voc-s-24c-192gb-3840s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server powered by an AMD EPYC-Rome processor. It features 24 physical cores and 24 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz. The CPU configuration allocates 1.0 thread per core with shared CPU allocation. Memory resources total 192.0 GB, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server includes 3840 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-capacity, low-latency data access. In synthetic benchmarks, the processor demonstrates strong performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2839.58 and a multi-core score of 67368.14, both placing in the top 25% of tested systems. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AES cryptography, and SHA_NI.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers a dense resource profile, combining a high memory capacity with substantial local NVMe storage on a shared CPU allocation model. This makes it suitable for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads that do not require dedicated CPU threads. Recommended workloads include large-scale databases, data caching layers, enterprise web applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Vultr voc-s-24c-192gb-3840s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server featuring 24 vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC-Rome processor running at 2.0 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with a shared CPU allocation, this instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB per core. It includes 3840 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-speed data access. In benchmark testing, the server achieved strong results, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2839.58 and a multi-core score of 67368.14, both ranking in the top 25%. The combination of high memory density and extensive local NVMe storage makes this server highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive and storage-heavy applications. It is well-suited for workloads such as large databases, caching layers, and data processing.
og_description: Vultr voc-s-24c-192gb-3840s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server with 24 AMD EPYC-Rome vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong top-25% benchmark performance.
meta_description: Vultr voc-s-24c-192gb-3840s-amd features 24 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory and storage server featuring twenty-four AMD EPYC cores and nearly four terabytes of local NVMe SSD capacity.

Equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core
